title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. lycaonicum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. lycaonicum, also known as rockrose, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of rockrose include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and even exhibit antifungal properties. Rockrose is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
